scripts.dev: concurrently -n docker,api,web,stripe -c magenta,blue,green,yellow "docker-compose up chrome" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/api" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/web" "stripe listen --forward-to localhost:4000/api/webhooks/stripe"
scripts.dev:api: docker-compose up chrome -d && npm run dev --workspace=apps/api
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=packages/db && npm run build --workspace=packages/emails
scripts.build:api: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace=apps/api
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run start --workspace=apps/api" "npm run start --workspace=apps/web"
scripts.prod: npm run build && npm run start
